title: Provincial, territorial, and international contacts - Canada.ca
content:
## Provincial, territorial, and international contacts
Links to other environmental agencies are provided on this page, including links to the web sites of the provincial/territorial environmental authorities, the US Environmental Protection Agency ( US EPA ), the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development ( OECD ), and the Basel Convention.
- Provincial and territorial web sites
- Other government web sites
- International organizations

## Provincial and territorial web sites
- Alberta - Environment and Natural Resources
- British Columbia Ministry of Environment
- Manitoba - Sustainable Development
- New Brunswick - Environment and Local Government
- Newfoundland and Labrador Department of Municipal Affairs and Environment
- Northwest Territories Department of Environment and Natural Resources
- Nova Scotia - Environment
- Nunavut Department of Environment
- Ontario Ministry of the Environment and Climate Change
- Prince Edward Island Department of Communities, Land and Environment
- Quebec - Sustainable Development, Environment and Fight against Climate Change
- Saskatchewan Ministry of Environment
- Yukon Department of Environment

## Other government web sites
- United States of America: US Environmental Protection Agency ( US EPA )
- EPA Resource Conservation and Recovery Act ( RCRA )
- Canadian Council of Ministers of the Environment

## International organizations
- OECD : OECD Environment - Waste Management
- United Nations Environment Programme ( UNEP ): Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and their Disposal

## Competent authorities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
